Bob Dylan 2003.11.02 Milan, Italy, Filaforum

Unknown rec. Great sound

CD 1 

1 intro 
2 To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano)
3 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Freddy on electric guitar, Tony on electric bass), 
4 Cry A While (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on slide guitar)
5 Desolation Row (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp)
6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 
7 Boots Of Spanish Leather (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern)
8 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano)
9 Dignity (Bob on piano)
10 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic) (Bob on piano)
11 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano)


CD2

1 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp)
2 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar)3 Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano)
4 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass)
5 Cat's In The Well (Bob on piano)
6 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano)
7 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp)
